channel.title: Azure Managed Redis on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure Managed Redis on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure Managed Redis now supports Entra ID based RBAC for data management
item.description:
Azure Managed Redis public preview adds Microsoft Entra ID-based RBAC for data access. This lets you control read, write, and admin permissions without using shared keys, using Redis ACLs underneath.

  • Source: Azure Updates
